summary:
The appropriate cleaner for an OT floor spill involves high-efficiency disinfection methods suitable for medical environments; specifically, agents like sodium hypochlorite from the available choices ensure thorough decontamination while maintaining safety protocols intact. \boxed{C}

The summary captures both the need for efficient disinfection aligned with hospital hygiene norms and specifies why chloride-based cleaners meet these criteria based on common practice guidelines discussed earlier. Agent
